channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Protesters block Iran’s women’s football team bus en route to airport
item.description: Protesters blocked a bus carrying Iran’s women’s football team in Australia after 5 players slipped away to seek asylum.

item.title: US defence chief ends Iran war briefing with prayer for troops
item.description: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth recited a prayer for US troops attacking Iran, asking for strength and protection.

item.title: What is the Hezbollah-linked financial institution Al-Qard Al-Hassan?
item.description: Israel reportedly struck a branch of Al-Qard Al-Hassan yesterday. But what is this institution linked to Hezbollah?

item.title: What are the Ukrainian drone interceptors sent to counter Iranian attacks?
item.description: Ukraine has battle experience with Iranian-made Shahed drones and has mass-produced cheap interceptors.

item.title: Women’s football team to be welcomed home with open arms, Iran says
item.description: Iran's Foreign Ministry and general prosecutor say the team is invited to return home 'with peace and confidence'.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz closure will have ‘ripple effect for weeks if not months’
item.description: ‘We could still be suffering the ripple effect of this for weeks, if not months’.

item.title: How will soaring oil prices caused by Iran war impact food cost?
item.description: Oil and gas are not just fuel, they are raw materials for thousands of products, including fertilisers used in farming.

item.title: Could Trump ‘take over’ the Strait of Hormuz as oil prices rise?
item.description: Oil prices spiked after shipments through the Strait of Hormuz were disrupted amid the Iran war.

item.title: Russia the only ‘winner’ of US-Israel war on Iran: EU Council president
item.description: Antonio Costa says Russia benefits from soaring global energy prices and attention being diverted from war in Ukraine.

item.title: Rescue workers search rubble after strikes hit Tehran neighbourhood
item.description: Rescuers search rubble and aid injured in Tehran’s Resalat neighbourhood after a reported Israeli strike.
